hadiths.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
hadiths.chapter: 25. Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan b. Saʿīd, al-Ṣā’igh (the jeweler), Abū Jaʿfar
hadiths.ar: 25 - محمد بن الحسن بن سعيد، الصائغ، أبو جعفر، كوفي. غال، ضعيف، لا يلتفت إليه.
hadiths.en: 25 – Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan b. Saʿīd, al-Ṣā’igh (the jeweler), Abū Jaʿfar.  Kufan.  A ghālī, weak, he is not turned to.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 25, H. 141
reference.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
reference.chapter: Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan b. Saʿīd, al-Ṣā’igh (the jeweler), Abū Jaʿfar
reference.location: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below) › Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan b. Saʿīd, al-Ṣā’igh (the jeweler), Abū Jaʿfar

hadiths.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
hadiths.chapter: 26. al-Muʿallā b. Muḥammad, al-Baṣrī, Abū Muḥammad
hadiths.ar: 26 - المعلى بن محمد، البصري، أبو محمد. يعرف حديثه، وينكر. ويروي عن الضعفاء ويجوز أن يخرج شاهدا.
hadiths.en: 26 – al-Muʿallā b. Muḥammad, al-Baṣrī, Abū Muḥammad.  His ḥadīth are recognized and denied.  He narrates from the weak narrators. It is permissible for him to be brought out as a witness.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 26, H. 142
reference.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
reference.chapter: al-Muʿallā b. Muḥammad, al-Baṣrī, Abū Muḥammad
reference.location: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below) › al-Muʿallā b. Muḥammad, al-Baṣrī, Abū Muḥammad

hadiths.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
hadiths.chapter: 27. Muḥammad b. Sālim b. Abū Salama, al-Kindī, al-Sijistānī
hadiths.ar: 27 - محمد بن سالم بن أبي سلمة، الكندي، السجستاني. يروي عن أبيه، في حديثه ضعف.
hadiths.en: 27 – Muḥammad b. Sālim b. Abū Salama, al-Kindī, al-Sijistānī.  He narrates from his father, in his ḥadīth there is weakness.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 27, H. 143
reference.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
reference.chapter: Muḥammad b. Sālim b. Abū Salama, al-Kindī, al-Sijistānī
reference.location: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below) › Muḥammad b. Sālim b. Abū Salama, al-Kindī, al-Sijistānī

hadiths.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
hadiths.chapter: 28. Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Khāqān, al-Nahdī, Abū Jaʿfar, al-Qalānisī
hadiths.ar: 28 - محمد بن أحمد بن خاقان، النهدي، أبو جعفر، القلانسي، الملقب " حمدان "، كوفي. ضعيف. يروي عن الضعفاء.
hadiths.en: 28 – Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Khāqān, al-Nahdī, Abū Jaʿfar, al-Qalānisī, who had the laqab of “Ḥamdān”.  Kufan.  Weak.  He narrates from the weak narrators.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 28, H. 144
reference.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
reference.chapter: Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Khāqān, al-Nahdī, Abū Jaʿfar, al-Qalānisī
reference.location: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below) › Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Khāqān, al-Nahdī, Abū Jaʿfar, al-Qalānisī

hadiths.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
hadiths.chapter: 29. Muḥammad b. Aḥmad, al-Jāmūrānī, Abū ʿAbdillāh, al-Rāzī
hadiths.ar: 29 - محمد بن أحمد، الجاموراني، أبو عبد الله، الرازي. ضعفه القميون، واستثنوا من كتاب " نوادر الحكمة " ما رواه. وفي مذهبه ارتفاع.
hadiths.en: 29 – Muḥammad b. Aḥmad, al-Jāmūrānī, Abū ʿAbdillāh, al-Rāzī.  The Qummis weakened him, and they excluded what he narrated from the book “Nawādir al-Ḥikma”.  In his madhhab there is irtifāʿ.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 29, H. 145
reference.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
reference.chapter: Muḥammad b. Aḥmad, al-Jāmūrānī, Abū ʿAbdillāh, al-Rāzī
reference.location: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below) › Muḥammad b. Aḥmad, al-Jāmūrānī, Abū ʿAbdillāh, al-Rāzī

hadiths.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
hadiths.chapter: 30. Muʿallā b. Rāshid
hadiths.ar: 30 - معلى بن راشد، العمي، بصري. ضعيف، غال.
hadiths.en: 30 – Muʿallā b. Rāshid, the blind.  Basran.  Weak.  ā ghālī.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 30, H. 146
reference.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
reference.chapter: Muʿallā b. Rāshid
reference.location: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below) › Muʿallā b. Rāshid

hadiths.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
hadiths.chapter: 31. Muḥammad b. Ismāʿīl b. Aḥmad b. Bashīr, al-Barmakī, Abū Jaʿfar
hadiths.ar: 31 - محمد بن إسماعيل بن أحمد بن بشير، البرمكي، أبو جعفر، المعروف بصاحب الصومعة. ضعيف.
hadiths.en: 31 – Muḥammad b. Ismāʿīl b. Aḥmad b. Bashīr, al-Barmakī, Abū Jaʿfar, the one who is known as the possessor of the hermitage.  Weak.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 31, H. 147
reference.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
reference.chapter: Muḥammad b. Ismāʿīl b. Aḥmad b. Bashīr, al-Barmakī, Abū Jaʿfar
reference.location: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below) › Muḥammad b. Ismāʿīl b. Aḥmad b. Bashīr, al-Barmakī, Abū Jaʿfar

hadiths.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
hadiths.chapter: 32. Muḥammad b. Baḥr, al-Ruhanī, al-Shaybānī, Abū al-Ḥusayn, al-Narmāshīrī
hadiths.ar: 32 - محمد بن بحر، الرهنى، الشيباني، أبو الحسين، النرماشيري. ضعيف، في مذهبه ارتفاع.
hadiths.en: 32 – Muḥammad b. Baḥr, al-Ruhanī, al-Shaybānī, Abū al-Ḥusayn, al-Narmāshīrī.  Weak, in his madhhab there is irtifāʿ.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 32, H. 148
reference.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
reference.chapter: Muḥammad b. Baḥr, al-Ruhanī, al-Shaybānī, Abū al-Ḥusayn, al-Narmāshīrī
reference.location: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below) › Muḥammad b. Baḥr, al-Ruhanī, al-Shaybānī, Abū al-Ḥusayn, al-Narmāshīrī

hadiths.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
hadiths.chapter: 33. Muḥammad b. al-Qāsim, al-Mufassir, al-Astarābādī
hadiths.ar: 33 - محمد بن القاسم، المفسر، الإسترآبادي. روى عنه أبو جعفر ابن بابويه. ضعيف، كذاب. روى عنه تفسيرا يرويه عن رجلين مجهولين: أحدهما يعرف بيوسف بن محمد بن زياد، والآخر: علي بن محمد بن يسار عن أبيهما، عن أبي الحسن الثالث (عليه السلام). والتفسير موضوع عن سهل الديباجي، عن أبيه بأحاديث من هذه المناكير.
hadiths.en: 33 – Muḥammad b. al-Qāsim, al-Mufassir, al-Astarābādī.  Abū Jaʿfar b. Bābawayh narrated from him.  Weak, a liar.  He narrated a tafsīr from him that he narrated from two unknown men: one of them known as Yūsuf b. Muḥammad b. Ziyād, and the other: ʿAlī b. Muḥammad b. Yasār, from their father from Abū al-Ḥasan the Third  عليه السلام .  The tafsīr is fabricated from Sahl alDībājī from his father with ḥadīths from these reprobates.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 33, H. 149
reference.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
reference.chapter: Muḥammad b. al-Qāsim, al-Mufassir, al-Astarābādī
reference.location: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below) › Muḥammad b. al-Qāsim, al-Mufassir, al-Astarābādī

hadiths.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
hadiths.chapter: 34. Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. Muḥammad b. al-Muṭṭalib, al-Shaybānī, Abū Mufaḍḍal
hadiths.ar: 34 - محمد بن عبد الله بن محمد بن المطلب، الشيباني، أبو المفضل. وضاع، كثير المناكير. رأيت كتبه، وفيها الأسانيد من دون المتون، والمتون من دون الأسانيد. وأرى ترك ما ينفرد به.
hadiths.en: 34 – Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. Muḥammad b. al-Muṭṭalib, al-Shaybānī, Abū Mufaḍḍal.  A fabricator, (he narrated) much that is denied.  I saw his books and in them are isnads without texts and texts without isnads.  I regard (that one must) abandon what he exclusively (narrates).

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 34, H. 150
reference.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
reference.chapter: Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. Muḥammad b. al-Muṭṭalib, al-Shaybānī, Abū Mufaḍḍal
reference.location: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below) › Muḥammad b. ʿAbdullāh b. Muḥammad b. al-Muṭṭalib, al-Shaybānī, Abū Mufaḍḍal

hadiths.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
hadiths.chapter: 35. Muḥammad b. Nuṣayr
hadiths.ar: 35 - محمد بن نصير. قال لي أبو محمد ابن طلحة بن علي بن عبد الله بن علاله: قال لنا أبو بكر الجعابي: كان محمد بن نصير من أفاضل أهل البصرة علما. وكان ضعيفا. بدء النصيرية، وإليه ينسبون. (انتهى. وهذا كلام السيد (رحمه الله). ولعله قد سقط من عدتها المذكورة أولا؛ إذ لا غلط أن الموجود هنا أربعة وثلاثون).
hadiths.en: 35 – Muḥammad b. Nuṣayr.  Abū Muḥammad b. Ṭalḥa b. ʿAlī b. ʿAbdullāh b. ʿAlālah said to me: Abū Bakr al-Jaʿābī said to us: Muḥammad b. Nuṣayr was from the virtuous folks of Basra in knowledge.  And he was weak.  He started the Nusayriyya, and to him they are attributed – the end (of this section), and this is from the speech of the sayyid رضي اP عنه .  And maybe he dropped from its aforementioned number first of all, then there is no mistake that what is found here is thirty four.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 35, H. 151
reference.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
reference.chapter: Muḥammad b. Nuṣayr
reference.location: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below) › Muḥammad b. Nuṣayr

hadiths.category: Wāw: One man
hadiths.chapter: 1. Wahb b. Wahb b. ʿAbdullāh b. Zamaʿa b. al-Aswad b. al-Muṭṭalib b. ʿAbd al-ʿUzā, Abū alBakhtarī
hadiths.ar: 1 - وهب بن وهب بن عبد الله بن زمعة بن الأسود بن المطلب بن عبد العزى، أبو البختري، القاضي. كذاب، عامي، إلا أن له عن جعفر بن محمد (عليه السلام) أحاديث كلها لا يوثق بها.
hadiths.en: 1 – Wahb b. Wahb b. ʿAbdullāh b. Zamaʿa b. al-Aswad b. al-Muṭṭalib b. ʿAbd al-ʿUzā, Abū alBakhtarī, the judge.  A liar, an ʿāmī, except that he has ḥadīth from Jaʿfar b. Muḥammad عليه السلام none of them are to be relied upon.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 1, H. 152
reference.category: Wāw: One man
reference.chapter: Wahb b. Wahb b. ʿAbdullāh b. Zamaʿa b. al-Aswad b. al-Muṭṭalib b. ʿAbd al-ʿUzā, Abū alBakhtarī
reference.location: Wāw: One man › Wahb b. Wahb b. ʿAbdullāh b. Zamaʿa b. al-Aswad b. al-Muṭṭalib b. ʿAbd al-ʿUzā, Abū alBakhtarī

hadiths.category: Yā: Seven men
hadiths.chapter: 1. Yūnus b. Zhabyan
hadiths.ar: 1 - يونس بن ظبيان، كوفي. غال، كذاب وضاع للحديث. روى عن أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام). لا يلتفت إلى حديثه.
hadiths.en: 1 – Yūnus b. Zhabyan, Kufan.  A ghālī, a liar and a fabricator of ḥadīth.  He narrated from Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام .  His ḥadīth are not turned to.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 1, H. 153
reference.category: Yā: Seven men
reference.chapter: Yūnus b. Zhabyan
reference.location: Yā: Seven men › Yūnus b. Zhabyan

hadiths.category: Yā: Seven men
hadiths.chapter: 2. Yūnus b. Bahman
hadiths.ar: 2 - يونس بن بهمن. غال، خطابي، كوفي يضع الحديث. روى عن أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام).
hadiths.en: 2 – Yūnus b. Bahman. A ghālī, a Khaṭṭābī.  Kufan.  He fabricates ḥadīth.  He narrated from Abū ʿAbdillāh . عليه السلام

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 2, H. 154
reference.category: Yā: Seven men
reference.chapter: Yūnus b. Bahman
reference.location: Yā: Seven men › Yūnus b. Bahman

hadiths.category: Yā: Seven men
hadiths.chapter: 3. Yaʿqūb b. al-Sarrāj
hadiths.ar: 3 - يعقوب بن السراج، كوفي. وله رواية عن أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام). ضعيف.
hadiths.en: 3 – Yaʿqūb b. al-Sarrāj.  Kufan.  He has a narration from Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام .  Weak.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 3, H. 155
reference.category: Yā: Seven men
reference.chapter: Yaʿqūb b. al-Sarrāj
reference.location: Yā: Seven men › Yaʿqūb b. al-Sarrāj

hadiths.category: Yā: Seven men
hadiths.chapter: 4. Yaḥyā b. Muḥammad b. ʿAlīm, al-Ḥalabī
hadiths.ar: 4 - يحيى بن محمد بن عليم، الحلبي. روى عن أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام). ضعيف.
hadiths.en: 4 – Yaḥyā b. Muḥammad b. ʿAlīm, al-Ḥalabī.  He narrated from Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام .  Weak.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 4, H. 156
reference.category: Yā: Seven men
reference.chapter: Yaḥyā b. Muḥammad b. ʿAlīm, al-Ḥalabī
reference.location: Yā: Seven men › Yaḥyā b. Muḥammad b. ʿAlīm, al-Ḥalabī

hadiths.category: Yā: Seven men
hadiths.chapter: 5. Yūsuf b. Yaʿqūb, al-Juʿfī
hadiths.ar: 5 - يوسف بن يعقوب، الجعفي. روى عن أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام) وجابر. ضعيف، مرتفع القول.
hadiths.en: 5 – Yūsuf b. Yaʿqūb, al-Juʿfī.  He narrated from Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام and Jābir.  Weak, a proponent of irtifāʿ in doctrine.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 5, H. 157
reference.category: Yā: Seven men
reference.chapter: Yūsuf b. Yaʿqūb, al-Juʿfī
reference.location: Yā: Seven men › Yūsuf b. Yaʿqūb, al-Juʿfī

hadiths.category: Yā: Seven men
hadiths.chapter: 6. Yūsuf b. al-Sakht
hadiths.ar: 6 - يوسف بن السخت، بصري. ضعيف، مرتفع القول، استثناه القميون من " نوادر الحكمة ".
hadiths.en: 6 – Yūsuf b. al-Sakht.  Basran.  Weak, a proponent of irtifāʿ in doctrine, the Qummis excluded him from “Nawādir al-Ḥikma”.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 6, H. 158
reference.category: Yā: Seven men
reference.chapter: Yūsuf b. al-Sakht
reference.location: Yā: Seven men › Yūsuf b. al-Sakht

hadiths.category: Yā: Seven men
hadiths.chapter: 7. Yaḥyā b. Zakariyya, al-Tarmāshīrī, Abū al-Ḥusayn
hadiths.ar: 7 - يحيى بن زكريا، الترماشيري، أبو الحسين. وضاع.
hadiths.en: 7 – Yaḥyā b. Zakariyya, al-Tarmāshīrī, Abū al-Ḥusayn.  A fabricator.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 7, H. 159
reference.category: Yā: Seven men
reference.chapter: Yaḥyā b. Zakariyya, al-Tarmāshīrī, Abū al-Ḥusayn

hadiths.category: The kunya: One man
hadiths.chapter: 1. Abū Talib, al-Azdī, al-Baṣrī, al-Shaʿrānī
hadiths.ar: 1 - أبو طالب، الأزدي، البصري، الشعراني. وله كتاب يرويه محمد بن خالد البرقي. قال أصحابنا: لا يعرف هذا الرجل إلا من جهته.
hadiths.en: 1 – Abū Talib, al-Azdī, al-Baṣrī, al-Shaʿrānī.  He has a book that Muḥammad b. Khālid al-Barqī narrates.  Our companions said: This man is not known except from his direction.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 1, H. 160
reference.category: The kunya: One man
reference.chapter: Abū Talib, al-Azdī, al-Baṣrī, al-Shaʿrānī
reference.location: The kunya: One man › Abū Talib, al-Azdī, al-Baṣrī, al-Shaʿrānī
